title: [Alex's Caves + EveryMole] Extra Underzealot Sacrifices
description: Adds new sacrifices using Every Mole mod for the Underzealots in Alex's Caves.
body:
**Extra Underzealot Sacrifices** is a small datapack made to be used with the mod [Every Mole](https://modrinth.com/mod/everymole), it includes different rituals that the Underzealots in [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) will be able to do besides the two classic ones. Some of the mobs come from other mods different from Alex's Caves, you will have to install them otherwise the result of the sacrifice will be a pig! You can remove any sacrifice by deleting any of the json files from the datapack. This datapack has been created because there are some mobs from these mods that for some reason never or rarely spawn and I thought of an interesting way to be able to access them at least. (Although there are others that I have added for fun.) ---

⚠️ Warning: Official Download Sources #### Beware! My content is **only** distributed for download from Modrinth and CurseForge.
#### Any other site doing so is **NOT** me!
